subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-08-03 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: A resurrection is set up! The world is topsy-turvy! The wrong side of human character is up! [KHH: A great tumult is ensuing. The whole world is in cataclysm. They are determined to cause universal upheaval.]
subcodes.first_line_orig: معرکه شده است دنیا بهم خورده است در کارند که همه بجان یکدیگر بریزند در امریکا و اروپا
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @the animal kingdom, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
